title: HomeZone Christmas Wooden Ladder Tree Hanging LED Lights - Rustic Space Saving Wall Tree Fairy Lights - Xmas Vintage Style Wall Mountable D.I.Y Scandinavian Shabby Chic Festive LED Decoration (123cm)
features: Specifications: H123 x L60 x D2cm, Star H7 x L8 x D1cm. Crafted from natural birch wood with strong jute rope, giving it a rustic, handmade appeal. Battery Powered and requires 2x AA's. Come complete with wooden and fabric hanging decor.
LED Fairy Lights: Supplied with warm white LEDs for a soft, glowing effect that creates the perfect Christmas ambience day or night.
Easy to Decorate & Display: Comes ready to hang — simply add your baubles and trimmings for a personalised festive touch. Perfect for walls, entryways, or living rooms.
Space-Saving Design: A wall-mounted Christmas tree ideal for small homes, flats, or offices — enjoy the festive spirit without taking up floor space.
Festive Style: Inspired by Nordic décor, this tree brings hygge warmth and minimalist charm to your home — a statement piece with timeless appeal.
description: Product Description HOMEZONE CHRISTMAS WOODEN LADDER WITH LED LIGHTS Transform your room decor into a festive wonderland with the HomeZone Christmas wooden ladder tree hanging LED lights. This unique and space-saving Christmas decoration combines the charm of a rustic wooden ladder with the enchantment of LED fairy lights, creating a magical holiday atmosphere in any room. our rustic hanging tree has been carefully created using rows of natural birch branches hung together with strong jute string, this wooden ladder tree exudes rustic charm. FEATURES: String light and hanging decorations included. Hanging layered wooden branches connected with Natural Jute String. carefully created using rows of natural birch branches. Triangle-shaped wall tree is touched up with bauble. 10 unique baubles intertwined with LED lights. Perfect for any home with not much space. Complete with beautiful and unique decorations and subtle sparkle. Battery Powered: 2 x AA Batteries (not included). DAZZLING LED LIGHTS The home decoration ladder is adorned with energy-efficient LED fairy lights; creating a warm and inviting glow that's perfect for holiday gatherings or quiet evenings beside the fireplace. SCANDINAVIAN SHANNY CHIC Embrace the Scandinavian shabby chic trend with this wall decor ladder tree. It complements a wide range of decor styles and brings a cosy, hygge-inspired feel to your home. EASY DIY INSTALLATION With its hanging layered wooden branches connected with natural jute string, Our ornaments, embellishments, and lights have been added to this triangle-shaped wall tree to create a lovely presentation. Setting up this festive decoration is a breeze. Simply mount it on your wall and plug it in for instant holiday cheer.
